title: Xi Jinping Calls China's Covid policy "Well Thought-Out": Report
description: Chinese President Xi Jinping defended his COVID-19 policy in his public address on the occasion of the new year, calling it "rational and well-thought-out."
snippet:
Chinese President Xi Jinping defended his COVID-19 policy in his public address on New Year.
